positive: A sophisticated, minimalist illustration of a stylized celestial garden. The composition features intertwined elements: glowing crescent moons, geometric nebula patterns, and stylized, bioluminescent flora (like glowing ferns and trumpet flowers). The style should be a blend of elegant Art Nouveau curvature and modern vector graphic precision, rendered with crisp lines and solid color blocks. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, luminous gold, and matte black. The arrangement should form a self-contained, symmetrical mandala-like pattern suitable for chest placement on apparel. Strong contrast is key, utilizing negative space effectively to make the glowing elements pop. The overall mood is mystical, peaceful, and aesthetically powerful.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, messy, grunge, photo, realism, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, graffiti
